case_title: CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP., VS. CHRISTOPHER W. BARNEY

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP.
